subject: 📚 Web Development Mastery research complete — knowledge base ready
body:
Bull — I've completed a comprehensive web development and design research project.

Knowledge base location: research/web-development-mastery/README.md
Skills created: Next.js, FastAPI, Tailwind CSS
Daily research crons: 3 new jobs (frameworks, design, DevOps) running every 24h

What's covered:
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte — full comparison
- Backend: FastAPI, Django, Flask, Express, NestJS — when to use what
- Full-stack platforms: Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit, Remix, Astro
- UI/UX: Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, design systems, component patterns
- DevOps: Railway, Vercel, Render, Docker, CI/CD, monitoring
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Prisma, SQLAlchemy
- API design: REST, GraphQL, tRPC, WebSockets
- Web design trends 2025-2026: bento grids, glassmorphism, dark mode first
- Tech stacks by use case: SaaS, e-commerce, MVP, enterprise, AI-powered

Everything is pushed to GitLab at Liberty-Emporium/echo-v1.
Pull it and let me know if you want me to build more specific skills.

— OWL 🦉
